Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X: DEFENDANT IS TERMINATED FROM CJC, FOUND NOTCLINICALLY SUITABLE/X: MATTER TO RETURN TO M11/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND FURTHER STAYED TO 01-11-22/X: BAIL SET AT $500/CONTD: BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/
/CAL:CJC PRG & PTC/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D//NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO01-04-22/X: BAIL SET AT $500/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/BWDNC/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS RE-REFERRED TO CJC OUT OF CUSTODY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROMCUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC RE-REFERRAL/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE LITTLE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:10,000/BWNUM:2ND/BWRET:M11/X: 3 OF 6 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/

/CAL:STATUS OF 21011359/DAWT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TORELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC PROGRESS REPORT & STAY AWAY ORDERS/DOPC/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/FTRRECORDED/X:THE MATTER IS REFERRED TO PTD/CGTW/PTD:1/CPSS/PROGPTD:09-21-21/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/X:DA MTR #19020281 TRAILING SUCCESSFUL DIVERSION/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT ONCE A WEEK IN PERSON TO MEET THEIR SOCIAL WORKER AND CALL IN 5 TIMES PER WEEK BY TELEPHONE/VD: 06-03-21/GTW/CONTD: PTC ON 07-08-21/DOPU: POS REPORT/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/NTW/LDTR:06-16-21/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 05-27-21 AND TRIAL ON 06-03-21/DOP/

/CAL:PTC/X:NEGATIVE REPORT RECEIVED/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D//NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO04-19-21/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/CONTD:PROCESS 5K BW STAY FROM 04-13-21/DOPC/
